zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet於1558年8月12日出生在英國諾福爾可盧加姆時，他的父親Sir Henry Yelverton32歲，母親Elizabeth Drury23歲。他於1586年3月12日與Dionysia Stubbes在英國英格蘭諾福爾可瑟其福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1631年10月30日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可盧加姆享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可盧加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet于1558年8月12日出生在英国諾福爾可盧加姆时，他的父亲Sir Henry Yelverton32岁，母亲Elizabeth Drury23岁。他于1586年3月12日与Dionysia Stubbes在英国英格兰諾福爾可瑟其福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1631年10月30日在英国英格兰諾福爾可盧加姆享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可盧加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Yelverton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon): habitational name from either of two places called Yelverton, in Norfolk or Devon. Medieval examples of the surname are from the Norfolk place, but the modern surname in Britain is associated mainly with Devon, where the earliest record of the surname is found in 1761, and is probably a substitution for Elford , an earlier form of the Devon placename. The Devon place, a hamlet in Buckland Monachorum, is not officially on record as Yelverton until the 19th century, when the Great Western Railway so named the station it built there in 1859. It is a dialect pronunciation of Elverton, which is first recorded in 1765 as an extended form of its medieval name Elford + -ton ‘town’. The Norfolk placename is recorded as Ailuertuna in 1086, and probably derives from the Old English personal name Æthelfrith or Geldfrith + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Elford
meanings: English: habitational name from Yelverton in Buckland Monachorum (Devon), recorded as Elleford in 1291 (see Yelverton ), named from the Old English personal name Ella or elle, ellen ‘elder tree’ + ford ‘ford’. The name may also derive from any of the places called Elford in Staffordshire and Northumberland, both probably from the Old English personal name Ella + ford.

variants.name: Yelvington
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Yelverton  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet was born on 12 August 1558, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir Henry Yelverton, was 32 and his mother, Elizabeth Drury, was 23. He married Dionysia Stubbes on 12 March 1586, in Sedgeford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 30 October 1631, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73, and was buried in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet est né le 12 août 1558, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Yelverton, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Drury, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Dionysia Stubbes le 12 mars 1586, à Sedgeford, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 30 octobre 1631, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet am 12. August 1558 in Rougham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry Yelverton 32 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Drury 23. Er hat am 12. März 1586 in Sedgeford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Dionysia Stubbes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 30. Oktober 1631 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet è nato il il 12 agosto 1558 nel Rougham, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Henry Yelverton, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Drury, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Dionysia Stubbes il 12 marzo 1586, nel Sedgeford, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 30 ottobre 1631, nel Rougham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Rougham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronetが1558年8月12日にイギリスノーフォルクロウアムで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Yelvertonは32歳，母Elizabeth Druryは23歳であった。1586年3月12日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクセジェフォードでDionysia Stubbesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1631年10月30日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクロウアムで73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクロウアムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet(이)가 1558년 8월 12일 영국 노르폴크 루그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry Yelverton(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Drury(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1586년 3월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 세지퍼드에서 Dionysia Stubbes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1631년 10월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 루그함에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 루그함에 묻혔다.

pt.12 August 1558–30 October 1631: 12 de agosto de 1558–30 de outubro de 1631
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet nasceu em 12 de agosto de 1558, em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry Yelverton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Drury, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Dionysia Stubbes em 12 de março de 1586, em Sedgeford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de outubro de 1631, em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet родился 12 августа 1558 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Henry Yelverton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Drury, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Dionysia Stubbes 12 марта 1586 г. в местности седжефорд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 30 октября 1631 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.12 August 1558–30 October 1631: 12 de agosto de 1558–30 de octubre de 1631
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet nació el 12 de agosto de 1558, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry Yelverton, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Drury, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Dionysia Stubbes el 12 de marzo de 1586, en Sedgeford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 30 de octubre de 1631, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
